name: Minecraft: Java & Bedrock (Official Key)
description: ⛏️ Official redeemable Minecraft Java + Bedrock key — legit and instant delivery.
long_description:
Minecraft: Java & Bedrock Edition (PC)

- Global key that works in Nepal and worldwide. - Delivered instantly to your Telegram. - Redeem via official Minecraft or Microsoft website. - Full access to Java and Bedrock editions. - Microsoft account required to activate. Note: Make sure you redeem the correct version (Java + Bedrock) on official site. This key gives both Java & Bedrock. Be sure to redeem it at the official Minecraft site or Microsoft account page and select the Java + Bedrock bundle if prompted.

name: GTA V (Steam)
description: ▶️ GTA V Premium Online Edition for Steam and Xbox — safe delivery, massive discount.
long_description:
GTA V: Premium Online Edition

includes full base game and Criminal Enterprise Starter Pack. Available on both Steam and Xbox platforms with multiple editions and pricing. Delivered instantly via Telegram with no login sharing.
requirements: Xbox version only works in countries with Xbox Live: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/live/countries. Ensure your region supports it.

name: RDR 2 (Xbox and PC)
description: 🐎 Red Dead Redemption 2 available on Xbox and Rockstar Launcher — discounted and secure.
long_description:
Red Dead Redemption 2

— An epic western experience now available with multiple editions. You can choose Xbox or Rockstar PC version. All editions come from official stores. No hacks or risky resells.
requirements: For Xbox, ensure your account and IP is in a region supported by Xbox Live: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/live/countries

name: Far Cry 6 (Xbox and Ubisoft)
description: 🔥 Far Cry 6 available on Xbox and Ubisoft — multiple editions with instant delivery.
long_description:
Far Cry 6

brings the revolution to your console or PC. Choose between Ubisoft PC version or Xbox key. Gold and Ultimate editions available. Delivered securely and instantly.
requirements: For Xbox, ensure your account and IP is in a region supported by Xbox Live: https://www.xbox.com/en-US/live/countries
